author: hMVp
content: Fixed test timeout on PR #1161. Root cause: task_id used BigInteger with sqlite_autoincrement=True in sqlalchemy_schema.py, but SQLite requires exactly INTEGER for AUTOINCREMENT. This caused OperationalError in SQLAlchemyStorageProvider.init(), crashing StorageController, which made TaskManager block forever on status_queue.get(). Fix: task_id → Integer, capped test_values task_id range, added missing dns_responses.redirect_url column. All storage tests pass locally.
